## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between ProjectMark and GrowthX to discuss marketing strategies, SEO progress, and content planning.](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO clicks growing from 40 to \~200 monthly; aiming for 250-260 next](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Focus on 3 in-depth articles over next 3 weeks: bid checklist, bid process, lead generation for construction companies](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [6 low-click, high-impression pages identified for improvement; avg. position 47th, targeting top 20](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Plan to create downloadable eBook combining bid management content as lead magnet](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Clicks grown from 40 to \~200 monthly](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Current week: 41 clicks, sustaining previous week's performance](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [March growth (180 clicks) stabilizing; next target 250-260 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [6 pages identified with high impressions but low clicks (avg. position 47th)](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
      - [Construction industry leads, ultimate consistency guide, social media marketing for construction companies, CRM management, construction sales process, construction technology](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Shift from quantity to quality: 3 in-depth articles over 3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
    1.  Bid checklist
    2.  Bid process
    3.  Best practices for lead generation for construction companies
  - [Some previously planned topics scrapped (e.g., construction payments, planning best practices)](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Aim: create cornerstone content for email marketing initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Future plan: combine bid management content into downloadable eBook as lead magnet](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

### CMS Access and Content Management

  - [Prateek lacking CMS access; Gus to follow up with designer for reset](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Most articles published; unpublished/archived due to topic relevance](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Prateek to review published vs. unpublished content once CMS access granted](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

### Email and Marketing Automation

  - [ProjectMark using Apollo for outreach; no full email automation yet](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Weekly blog emails sent for engagement](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Potential for future segmented, targeted email campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [ABM (Account-Based Marketing) campaign planned but requires significant time/effort](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

### Collaboration and Knowledge Sharing

  - [Prateek offered support on email automation, WhatsApp automation, and general marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Open invitation for strategy discussions to avoid working in silos](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Gus to ensure CMS access reset for Prateek](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [Prateek to start work on 3 in-depth articles (bid checklist first)](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Prateek to review and improve 6 low-performing pages](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Gus to consider ABM campaign planning](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Both to explore potential for creating bid management eBook after new content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ZPJ3svajGhVJsvSbn6sKbKDxCu1tRD5T?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
